reviews.review_msg: I have taken 2 class with Noel, and he is great! His teaching style is old school - no online submissions/canvas or power point presentations. lectures can feel long sometimes, but always informative. If you are truly passionate about anthropology you will appreciate and enjoy his classes although I may not recommend for ppl who aren't.

Um, confusing and kind of intimidating. He has these answers that he's looking for but he doesn't really know how to frame his questions properly. Assignments aren't explained too clearly...just confused. Weird class.
Simply the best professor in the department!
Great teacher, very respectful of students.Highly recommended. Lots of reading--it is interesting.

Dara is amazing! She is extremely approachable inside and outside of class. She creates a great atmosphere with her classroom. She managed to get everyone engaged even though it was an 8:30am class. Lots of reading, but if you can keep up her classes are very interesting. I definitely recommend her!

Dara is amazing! She is extremely approachable inside and outside of class. She creates a great atmosphere with her classroom. She managed to get everyone engaged even though it was an 8:30am class. Lots of reading, but if you can keep up her classes are very interesting. I definitely recommend her!

Dara is amazing! She is extremely approachable inside and outside of class. She creates a great atmosphere with her classroom. She managed to get everyone engaged even though it was an 8:30am class. Lots of reading, but if you can keep up her classes are very interesting. I definitely recommend her!

Disappointing! Did not link themes to books/articles read. Seminar discussion was often dominated by her, not the students (except the one or two favourites she had in class). There was no need for this class to be a 4 hour seminar - there was no collaborative learning, nor respective of various perspectives whatsoever. Skip this prof!

Disappointing! Did not link themes to books/articles read. Seminar discussion was often dominated by her, not the students (except the one or two favourites she had in class). There was no need for this class to be a 4 hour seminar - there was no collaborative learning, nor respective of various perspectives whatsoever. Skip this prof!
Dr.Millar was an exceptional professor, bringing interesting subjects and readings. I am exited to have her next term again
All around had a really good experience with her - she's very passionate about what she does and it's evident by her lectures.

Kathleen is passionate about what she teaches. She loves group discussions and participation. I loved being in her seminars because it was the only class in my semester where I learned something applicable to real life and my program. Marking is fair. Easy to approach and to ask questions. Wished she put slides online more and had more powerpoints

Stacy is one of the best professors I have ever had. She genuinely wants her students to grapple with difficult questions and will take your concerns seriously. Plus, she has a great sense of humor, is approachable, and brilliant. If you are interested and enthusiastic about contemporary concerns in anthropology, take Stacy's class.
Absolutely fantastic! She is a personable person and gives the same curtsies to you. Work hard and you'll do fine. :)
No Comments
